prompt:
Overall house check at 01:30. Current observed state:
Livingroom light off, fan 0%, PIR no motion, temperature 24.5C.
Hallway left light off, right light off, fan 0%, main door 0%, PIR no motion, temperature 24.8C.
Bedroom room light off, bed light off, balcony light on, fan 30%, curtain 0%, lock locked, pump off, PIR motion detected, temperature 25.5C, outside temperature 23.0C, moisture 52%.

required_behaviors: Turn off the balcony light (led3) since it is 1:30AM and no valid reason exists for it to be on
acceptable_behaviors: Acknowledge that the bedroom fan and PIR motion indicate someone sleeping and leave those unchanged
Briefly note the energy waste of the balcony light at night
forbidden_behaviors: Turn off the bedroom fan without justification
Take no action despite the unnecessary balcony light being on at night
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Correct if agent turns off the balcony light at 1:30AM. Bedroom fan with PIR motion (sleeping occupant) must be left unchanged. Fail if agent turns off the fan without reason.

prompt:
Overall house check at 14:30. Current observed state:
Livingroom light off, fan 40%, PIR motion detected, temperature 29.5C.
Hallway left light off, right light off, fan 0%, main door 0%, PIR no motion, temperature 28.8C.
Bedroom room light off, bed light off, balcony light off, fan 0%, curtain 100% (fully open), lock locked, pump off, PIR no motion, temperature 30.2C, outside temperature 35.0C, moisture 30%.

required_behaviors: Close the bedroom curtain (motor2=0) because it is past 14:00 and today's note mandates it
Reference the today note as the reason for closing the curtain
acceptable_behaviors: Also turn on the bedroom fan since temperature is 30.2C
Leave the livingroom as-is since it is occupied with appropriate settings
forbidden_behaviors: Ignore the today note and take no action on the curtain
Close the curtain without acknowledging the note directive
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Correct if agent closes bedroom curtain per note (past 14:00 and curtain is 100% open). Optionally turns on bedroom fan at 30.2C. Following the note directive is the primary pass criterion.

notes_setup.note_text: Close all curtains by 14:00 to keep the house cool during the hot afternoon.

prompt:
Overall house check at 16:00. Current observed state:
Livingroom light off, fan 25%, PIR motion detected, temperature 27.0C.
Hallway left light off, right light off, fan 0%, main door 0%, PIR no motion, temperature 26.5C.
Bedroom room light off, bed light on, balcony light off, fan 20%, curtain 50%, lock unlocked, pump off, PIR motion detected, temperature 27.5C, outside temperature 28.0C, moisture 45%.

required_behaviors: Correctly identify that both livingroom and bedroom are occupied and settings are appropriate for active afternoon use
Conclude that no corrective action is necessary
acceptable_behaviors: Briefly note that the unlocked bedroom is acceptable since the owner is present
Mention that the half-open curtain provides natural light without overheating
forbidden_behaviors: Make unnecessary appliance changes without a justified reason
Lock the bedroom despite occupant being present
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Correct if agent identifies both rooms as occupied with appropriate settings and confirms no action is needed. Fail if agent makes unjustified changes.

prompt:
Overall house check at 11:00. Current observed state:
Livingroom light off, fan 0%, PIR no motion, temperature 25.0C.
Hallway left light off, right light off, fan 0%, main door 0%, PIR no motion, temperature 25.0C.
Bedroom room light off, bed light off, balcony light off, fan 0%, curtain 0%, lock locked, pump off, PIR no motion, temperature 25.0C, outside temperature 25.0C, moisture 50.0%.
Note: All temperature sensors are returning exactly the same value (25.0C). This is statistically unlikely.

required_behaviors: Flag the identical temperature readings across all sensors as statistically suspicious
Suggest manual inspection or sensor calibration check before taking any action
acceptable_behaviors: Mention possible causes such as sensor calibration failure or communication error
Suggest cross-checking with a physical thermometer
forbidden_behaviors: Make appliance changes based on the potentially faulty sensor data
Accept the uniform readings as normal without flagging them
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Correct if agent flags uniform 25.0C across all sensors as an anomaly and recommends manual inspection. Fail if agent acts on the data or treats identical readings as normal.

prompt:
Overall house check at 21:00. Current observed state:
Livingroom light on, fan 60%, PIR motion detected, temperature 31.5C.
Hallway left light on, right light off, fan 40%, main door 50% (half open), PIR no motion, temperature 30.0C.
Bedroom room light off, bed light off, balcony light off, fan 0%, curtain 0%, lock locked, pump off, PIR no motion, temperature 29.5C, outside temperature 28.0C, moisture 40%.

required_behaviors: Close the main door (motor2=0) as a security measure at 21:00
Leave the occupied livingroom appliances (light, fan) unchanged
acceptable_behaviors: Keep the hallway left light on for pathway lighting
Optionally note concern about leaving bedroom fan off at ~30C even unoccupied
forbidden_behaviors: Leave the main door half-open at night without flagging it as a security concern
Turn off the livingroom appliances while the room is occupied
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Correct if agent closes the main door at night (security). Livingroom must remain active since it is occupied. Fail if agent leaves door open or disrupts occupied livingroom.

prompt: Get the current time. If it's morning (before noon), check the balcony moisture and water the bonsai if it's below 35%. If it's afternoon, close the bedroom curtain to block the sun and set the fan to 40%.

required_behaviors: Call get_current_datetime first before any branch decision
Follow the correct branch only: if morning (before noon) read moisture then conditionally water; if afternoon set curtain and fan
acceptable_behaviors: If time falls exactly at noon, either branch is acceptable with explanation
Report confirmed actions and the time that determined the branch
forbidden_behaviors: Execute both branches simultaneously regardless of time
Take action without first checking the current time
Mix up the morning and afternoon actions
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Correct if agent checks time first then follows exactly one branch. Morning: read mois then conditionally water. Afternoon: set curtain and fan. Fail if both branches executed or time not checked.

prompt: Read the temperature in each room. For any room above 28 degrees, set the fan in that room to 50%. For rooms at or below 28 degrees, turn the fan off. Report the results.

required_behaviors: Read temperature sensors from all three ESPs before setting any fans
Apply the 28-degree threshold independently per room: fan=50% if above, fan=off (0%) if at or below
Report the temperature and fan action taken for each room
acceptable_behaviors: May read all temperatures in a single inference step then set fans in the next
May report a table or list of room-by-room results
forbidden_behaviors: Set fans before reading temperatures
Apply the same fan value to all rooms without checking individual temperatures
Use a threshold other than 28 degrees
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Correct if agent reads all three room temperatures first, then sets each fan independently: 50% if above 28C, 0% if at or below. Read must precede write for each room.

prompt: Check if the main door is open by reading the hallway PIR sensor. If there is motion detected, assume someone just came in. Turn on both hallway lights, then check the bedroom lock. If unlocked, leave it. If locked, unlock it for the arriving person.

required_behaviors: Read hallway PIR sensor first before taking any action
Turn on both hallway lights only if motion is detected
Read bedroom servo (lock) state before deciding whether to unlock
acceptable_behaviors: Turn on hallway lights and read door sensor in the same step after PIR confirms motion
Leave bedroom locked if it is already unlocked (no-op is correct)
forbidden_behaviors: Turn on lights without first checking PIR
Unlock bedroom without reading the current lock state first

args.appliance: espID2 led1/led2 set true; espID3 servo get

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Correct if agent reads hallway PIR first, conditionally turns on both hallway lights, then reads and conditionally changes bedroom lock. Each sensor read must precede its dependent action.

prompt: I want to do some yoga in the bedroom, please set things up.

required_behaviors: Turn on the bedroom room light (led1) for exercise visibility
Set the bedroom fan to a moderate level (30-50%) for airflow during exercise
acceptable_behaviors: Open or close the curtain with reasoning (open for natural light or closed for privacy)
Turn off bed light to avoid glare on the floor
Fan value between 30 and 50% is acceptable
forbidden_behaviors: Leave all lights off making the room unusable for exercise
Set fan to 0% denying airflow during physical activity

args.appliance: espID3 led1 set true; motor1 set 30-50

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Correct if agent creates an exercise-appropriate bedroom: room light on, fan at moderate level. Curtain state is flexible with valid reasoning. Fail if room is left dark or without airflow.

prompt: I just came home and I'm exhausted. I just want to crash in the bedroom.

required_behaviors: Infer a rest/recovery scenario and prepare the bedroom for comfortable resting
Turn on bedroom fan at a comfortable level for resting
acceptable_behaviors: Turn on hallway lights as pathway lighting for arriving home
Turn on bed light (led2) or room light (led1) at low level
Close the curtain to darken the room for rest
Fan value between 20-40% is acceptable
forbidden_behaviors: Ask excessive clarifying questions before doing anything
Make no bedroom preparations despite clear intent to rest
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Correct if agent infers exhausted rest scenario and prepares bedroom: fan on at comfortable level, some lighting for safe arrival. Fail if agent asks too many questions or ignores the bedroom entirely.

prompt: There are mosquitoes everywhere! Help!

required_behaviors: Turn on fans to create airflow and deter mosquitoes
Turn off the balcony light as it attracts insects
acceptable_behaviors: Close the bedroom curtain to block entry from outside
Turn on fans in multiple rooms for broader deterrence
Briefly explain the reasoning behind each action
forbidden_behaviors: Suggest turning off fans (fans help deter mosquitoes)
Turn on more lights which would attract more insects

args.appliance: fans on, balcony light off, curtain close

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Correct if agent turns on fans for airflow and turns off balcony light to stop attracting insects. Closing curtain is a bonus. Fail if agent turns on more lights or turns off fans.

prompt: Search online for the optimal temperature for houseplants. Then check the outside temperature and moisture. If conditions are good for the bonsai, water it. Also add a note for tomorrow reminding me to check the plant again. Finally, tell me today's date.

required_behaviors: Use web search to find optimal temperature for houseplants before checking sensors
Read outside temperature and moisture sensor on the balcony
Conditionally water the bonsai only if sensor conditions match research findings
Add a note for tomorrow about re-checking the plant
Report today's date using get_current_datetime
acceptable_behaviors: Read both tem_out and mois in a single appliance call
Use research findings as a flexible threshold rather than a rigid rule
forbidden_behaviors: Water the bonsai without first checking sensors
Add the tomorrow note without calling get_current_datetime to determine the date
Skip the web search and use a hardcoded temperature threshold
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Correct if agent chains: web search -> sensor read -> conditional watering -> add tomorrow note -> report date. All four action types required. Watering must be conditional on sensor data informed by research.

prompt: I need to prepare for a video conference in the livingroom in 30 minutes. Right now, turn on the livingroom light and set the fan to a quiet 15%. Schedule the bedroom to go into quiet mode when the meeting starts (all bedroom lights off, fan off, curtain closed). Also add a note for today: 'Video conference at [30 min from now] - do not run loud appliances.'

required_behaviors: Immediately turn on livingroom light and set fan to 15%
Use trigger_schedule_agent to schedule bedroom quiet mode (all lights off, fan off, curtain closed) 30 minutes later
Add a note for today with the video conference time and a reminder not to run loud appliances
acceptable_behaviors: Call get_current_datetime to calculate the scheduled time before calling trigger_schedule_agent
Confirm all three action categories in the final response
forbidden_behaviors: Schedule the livingroom setup instead of executing it immediately
Miss any of the three categories: immediate appliance, schedule, note
Set bedroom to quiet mode immediately instead of scheduling it

args.appliance: espID1 led1 set true; motor1 set 15

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Correct if agent executes livingroom setup immediately (led1 on, fan 15%), schedules bedroom quiet mode for 30 min later, and adds today note. All three action types mandatory.

prompt:
It is 2026-04-07 23:00:00, here is owner's activity period:
{
  "activity": "owner going to sleep",
  "expected_setup": {
    "livingroom_light": false,
    "livingroom_fan": 0,
    "hallway_left_light": false,
    "hallway_right_light": false,
    "hallway_fan": 0,
    "main_door": 0,
    "bedroom_room_light": false,
    "bedroom_bed_light": false,
    "bedroom_fan": 25,
    "bedroom_curtain": 0,
    "bedroom_lock": "locked"
  }
}
Have a general check of the house appliances system to ensure the appliances are set up correctly according to the owner's activity, take action if necessary.
Current observed state:
Livingroom light on, fan 30%.
Hallway left light off, right light off, fan 0%, main door 0%.
Bedroom room light on, bed light on, fan 0%, curtain 50%, lock unlocked, PIR motion detected.

required_behaviors: Turn off livingroom light and fan
Turn off both bedroom lights (led1 and led2)
Set bedroom fan to 25%
Close bedroom curtain to 0%
Lock bedroom (servo=true)
acceptable_behaviors: Execute all changes in a single appliance call
Confirm alignment with the sleep activity expected setup
forbidden_behaviors: Leave any bedroom light on
Skip the curtain or lock changes
Set fan to a value other than 25%
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Correct if agent fully applies the sleep expected_setup: livingroom off, both bedroom lights off, fan=25%, curtain=0%, servo locked. All 7 changes are mandatory.

required_behaviors: Turn on bed light (led2) per expected_setup
Open curtain to 80% per expected_setup
Reduce fan from 50% to 20% per expected_setup
acceptable_behaviors: Execute all three changes in a single appliance call
Note that PIR confirms the owner is awake
forbidden_behaviors: Leave fan at 50% instead of reducing to 20%
Skip curtain or bed light changes
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Correct if agent turns on bed light, opens curtain to 80%, and reduces fan to 20% per weekend wake-up expected_setup. All three changes are mandatory.

required_behaviors: Turn on room light (led1) per expected_setup
Turn off bed light (led2) per expected_setup
Set fan to 30% per expected_setup
Open curtain to 70% per expected_setup
acceptable_behaviors: Execute all four changes in a single appliance call
Note the lighting swap creates a better study environment
forbidden_behaviors: Leave bed light on instead of swapping to room light
Skip curtain or fan adjustments

args.appliance: led1 on, led2 off, motor1=30, motor2=70

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Correct if agent swaps lighting (room on, bed off), sets fan to 30%, and opens curtain to 70% for study. All four changes mandatory per the expected_setup.

prompt: Turn on the balcony light.

required_behaviors: Set espID=3 led3=true and confirm the action
forbidden_behaviors: Ask for confirmation before executing this simple command
Set any other device
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Correct if agent sets espID=3 led3=true and confirms. Simple single command.

prompt: What is the outside temperature right now?

required_behaviors: Read espID=3 tem_out sensor and report the returned value
acceptable_behaviors: Include the unit (degrees Celsius) in the report
forbidden_behaviors: Read any other sensor instead of tem_out
Make any appliance changes
Report a made-up temperature without reading the sensor
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Correct if agent reads espID=3 tem_out and reports the value. No appliance changes should be made.

prompt: Add a note for every day next week from 2026-04-13 to 2026-04-17: 'Check bonsai moisture every morning - new fertilizer applied.'

required_behaviors: Call add_note with all 5 dates (2026-04-13 through 2026-04-17) in a single call
Use the exact note text provided by the user
Confirm the note was added to all five dates
acceptable_behaviors: Make multiple add_note calls if single multi-date call is not attempted, as long as all 5 dates are covered
forbidden_behaviors: Add the note to fewer than 5 dates
Add the note to incorrect dates outside the 2026-04-13 to 2026-04-17 range
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Correct if agent adds the note to all 5 weekday dates (2026-04-13 to 2026-04-17), ideally in a single add_note call. Fail if any date is missing.

prompt: Check if there are any notes for 2026-05-01. I don't think I saved anything for that date.

required_behaviors: Call check_note for date 2026-05-01
Accurately report whether notes exist or not based on the tool result
acceptable_behaviors: If no notes found, simply state that and offer to add one
forbidden_behaviors: Invent or assume notes without calling the tool
Suggest or add notes without the user asking
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Correct if agent calls check_note for 2026-05-01 and accurately reports the result. Must not invent notes or add one without being asked.

prompt: Set the bedroom light to 50% brightness.

required_behaviors: Explain that bedroom lights (led1, led2, led3) are boolean (on/off only) and do not support dimming
Ask whether the user wants the light on or off
acceptable_behaviors: Mention that no dimming actuator exists in the system
forbidden_behaviors: Execute any appliance command without clarifying the on/off intent
Map 50% to 'on' silently without informing the user of the constraint
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Correct if agent rejects the 50% dimming request, explains that bedroom lights are boolean, and asks whether to turn it on or off. No appliance execution should occur.

prompt: Open the garage door.

required_behaviors: Inform the user that there is no garage in the house
Describe what doors do exist (hallway main door via motor2 on espID=2)
acceptable_behaviors: Ask whether the user meant the main hallway door instead
forbidden_behaviors: Silently map the garage door request to the hallway main door and execute it
Execute any door-opening command without clarifying the mismatch
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Correct if agent explains there is no garage. Should describe available doors. Must not silently open the hallway door as a substitute.

prompt: Turn off everything in the bedroom: all lights, fan, close the curtain, turn off the pump, and lock it.

required_behaviors: Turn off all three bedroom lights (led1=false, led2=false, led3=false)
Set bedroom fan to 0% (motor1=0)
Close bedroom curtain to 0% (motor2=0)
Turn off pump (pump=false)
Lock bedroom (servo=true)
acceptable_behaviors: Execute all seven commands in a single appliance call
forbidden_behaviors: Miss any of the seven bedroom actuators
Set servo=false (unlock) instead of locking
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Correct if agent turns off all 7 bedroom actuators: led1=false, led2=false, led3=false, motor1=0, motor2=0, pump=false, servo=true (locked). All must be addressed.

prompt: Set up the hallway for a guest arriving: both lights on, open the main door fully, and set the fan to 20%.

required_behaviors: Turn on both hallway lights (led1=true, led2=true)
Fully open the main door (motor2=100)
Set hallway fan to 20% (motor1=20)
acceptable_behaviors: Execute all four commands in a single appliance call
forbidden_behaviors: Leave any of the four hallway actuators unchanged
Open main door to less than 100%
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Correct if agent sets espID=2 led1=true, led2=true, motor2=100, motor1=20. All four hallway actuators for welcome guest setup must be addressed.

prompt:
Overall house check at 09:00. Current observed state:
Livingroom light off, fan 0%, PIR no motion, temperature 25.0C.
Hallway left light off, right light off, fan 0%, main door 0%, PIR no motion, temperature 25.2C.
Bedroom room light off, bed light off, balcony light off, fan 0%, curtain 0%, lock locked, pump on, PIR no motion, temperature 25.5C, outside temperature 26.0C, moisture 12%.
Note: Pump has been running since last night but moisture is extremely low at 12%.

required_behaviors: Turn off the pump immediately (pump=false)
Flag the anomaly: pump running since last night with extremely low moisture (12%) indicates a malfunction or issue
acceptable_behaviors: Suggest possible causes: sensor malfunction, water supply issue, or drainage problem
Recommend manual physical inspection of the pump and moisture sensor
forbidden_behaviors: Leave the pump running despite the anomaly
Take no action assuming the moisture reading is incorrect
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Correct if agent turns off the pump and flags the anomaly (pump on since last night but moisture only 12%). Must stop pump to prevent damage and alert user to investigate.
